source: publicly documented dataset cards, papers, and project sites as of 2026-05
note: Crawl windows are approximate. Inclusion is plausibility, not proof. Models trained on these corpora are downstream — a date hit means your work could be in the corpus, not that any specific model has memorized it.

corpora.name: Common Crawl
corpora.swept: Public web pages, monthly snapshots. The substrate under almost every other text corpus on this list — C4, The Pile, RedPajama, FineWeb all start here.
corpora.optOut: Block CCBot in robots.txt. Past snapshots already published cannot be recalled.

corpora.name: C4 (Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus)
corpora.swept: A single Common Crawl snapshot from April 2019, cleaned and deduplicated. Used to train T5 and many open models since.
corpora.optOut: None — C4 is a frozen historical snapshot.

corpora.name: The Pile
corpora.swept: 825 GB of text: arXiv, GitHub, Stack Exchange, PubMed, Wikipedia, Books3, OpenWebText2, plus a Common Crawl slice. Built by EleutherAI; foundational for many open LLMs.
corpora.optOut: None — The Pile is a frozen archive. Books3 was removed from the official distribution in 2023 but persists in older mirrors.

corpora.name: Books3
corpora.swept: ~196,000 books scraped from Bibliotik. Removed from public distribution in 2023 after author lawsuits but remains in many trained models.
corpora.optOut: The Atlantic's lookup tool can tell you if your title is in the set.

corpora.name: OpenWebText / OpenWebText2
corpora.swept: Pages linked from Reddit posts with at least 3 upvotes. A reconstruction of OpenAI's original WebText.

corpora.name: LAION-400M
corpora.swept: 400 million image URLs paired with alt text, harvested from Common Crawl. Used to train early Stable Diffusion variants and many open vision-language models.
corpora.optOut: Submit URLs to Have I Been Trained for inclusion in the Spawning opt-out registry.

corpora.name: LAION-5B
corpora.swept: 5.85 billion image-text pairs from Common Crawl. The training set behind Stable Diffusion 1.x/2.x and many derivatives. Pulled from public download in late 2023 after CSAM was found in the index; a cleaned version (Re-LAION) followed.
corpora.optOut: Have I Been Trained (Spawning) — submit URLs and request removal from future LAION releases.

corpora.name: RedPajama
corpora.swept: 1.2 trillion token open reproduction of LLaMA's training mix: Common Crawl, C4, GitHub, ArXiv, Wikipedia, Stack Exchange, books.
corpora.optOut: None — frozen snapshot. Block CCBot to reduce future inclusion.

corpora.name: FineWeb / FineWeb-Edu
corpora.swept: 15 trillion tokens of cleaned Common Crawl text from HuggingFace. The current open-source standard for high-quality web text.
corpora.optOut: Block CCBot in robots.txt before the next CC snapshot.

corpora.name: GitHub public code
corpora.swept: Public repositories scraped for The Stack, CodeParrot, RedPajama-Code, and used in training Codex, Copilot, Claude, GPT-4, and most code LLMs.
corpora.optOut: Am I In The Stack — opt out by repo or commit email at https://huggingface.co/spaces/bigcode/in-the-stack

corpora.name: Wikipedia
corpora.swept: Every public Wikipedia article, every revision. Included in essentially every text corpus ever assembled.
corpora.optOut: None — Wikipedia is CC-BY-SA and dumped openly.

optOutTools.name: Have I Been Trained
optOutTools.covers: LAION-400M, LAION-5B (image search). Lets you opt URLs out of future Spawning-partnered training runs (Stability AI, Hugging Face, Shutterstock).

optOutTools.name: Am I In The Stack
optOutTools.covers: The Stack v1/v2 — public GitHub code corpus. Opt out by GitHub username; future Stack releases honor the registry.

optOutTools.name: Glaze
optOutTools.covers: Adversarial perturbation that protects images from style mimicry by future training runs. Defensive — does not remove past inclusions.

optOutTools.name: Nightshade
optOutTools.covers: Adversarial poison for images — corrupts the concept association in models that train on shaded images. Offensive variant of Glaze.

optOutTools.name: robots.txt + ai.txt
optOutTools.covers: Block crawlers like CCBot, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot. Only affects future crawls; past snapshots are immutable.

optOutTools.name: The Atlantic — Books3 search
optOutTools.covers: Look up whether a book title is in the Books3 corpus. Read-only — there is no opt-out.
